aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with a clear service focus and contact information but lacks depth in content, reviews, and keyword optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize service pages with targeted keywords and location-specific content.
Implement a blog to provide valuable content and target long-tail keywords.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has a Google Business Profile (GBP) but lacks reviews and complete information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The GBP is not fully optimized. It needs more reviews, accurate business hours, and detailed service descriptions.
critical_issues: Incomplete business information (e.g., missing business hours, services).
Lack of regular updates and posts on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across different platforms, which can confuse search engines and customers.
action_items: Audit and update all online directories and listings to ensure consistent NAP information.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and Yellow Pages.
Monitor and manage citations regularly to maintain consistency.

schema_gaps: Product schema for specific HVAC products.
Review schema to showcase customer testimonials.
Service schema for detailed service descriptions and pricing.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of content depth and keyword optimization.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Long-tail keywords and niche service queries.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Optimize existing service pages with targeted keywords and add a blog to target long-tail queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish expert articles and guides on HVAC topics to establish industry authority and improve search visibility.
